'''zogalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kuiperoidal|kuiperoidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kuiperoidal|kuiperoidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zogalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zogalithi|zogalithi]] || [[word:zogaliji|zogaliji]] || [[word:zogalishi|zogalishi]] || [[word:zogaliki|zogaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zogaluthuthu|zogaluthuthu]] || [[word:zogalujuju|zogalujuju]] || [[word:zogalushushu|zogalushushu]] || [[word:zogalukuku|zogalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zogaluthu|zogaluthu]] || [[word:zogaluju|zogaluju]] || [[word:zogalushu|zogalushu]] || [[word:zogaluku|zogaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zogalufthuf|zogalufthuf]] || [[word:zogalufjuf|zogalufjuf]] || [[word:zogalufshuf|zogalufshuf]] || [[word:zogalufkuf|zogalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zogalethe|zogalethe]] || [[word:zogaleje|zogaleje]] || [[word:zogaleshe|zogaleshe]] || [[word:zogaleke|zogaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zogalothotho|zogalothotho]] || [[word:zogalojojo|zogalojojo]] || [[word:zogaloshosho|zogaloshosho]] || [[word:zogalokoko|zogalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zogalotho|zogalotho]] || [[word:zogalojo|zogalojo]] || [[word:zogalosho|zogalosho]] || [[word:zogaloko|zogaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zogalofthof|zogalofthof]] || [[word:zogalofjof|zogalofjof]] || [[word:zogalofshof|zogalofshof]] || [[word:zogalofkof|zogalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfthÃŸf|zogalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfjÃŸf|zogalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfshÃŸf|zogalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfkÃŸf|zogalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zogalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zogalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zogalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zogalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfthÃŸf|zogalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfjÃŸf|zogalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfshÃŸf|zogalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfkÃŸf|zogalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfthÃŸf|zogalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfjÃŸf|zogalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfshÃŸf|zogalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zogalÃŸfkÃŸf|zogalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zogalÃḊthÃḊ|zogalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zogalÃḊjÃḊ|zogalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zogalÃḊshÃḊ|zogalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zogalÃḊkÃḊ|zogalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zogalathatha|zogalathatha]] || [[word:zogalajaja|zogalajaja]] || [[word:zogalashasha|zogalashasha]] || [[word:zogalakaka|zogalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zogalatha|zogalatha]] || [[word:zogalaja|zogalaja]] || [[word:zogalasha|zogalasha]] || [[word:zogalaka|zogalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zogalafthaf|zogalafthaf]] || [[word:zogalafjaf|zogalafjaf]] || [[word:zogalafshaf|zogalafshaf]] || [[word:zogalafkaf|zogalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zogalasha|zogalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zogalshÃḋasha|zogalshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zogalroasha|zogalroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zogalmuasha|zogalmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zogalyaasha|zogalyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozogalnkshÃḋasha|gozogalnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozogalnkroasha|gozogalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozogalnkmuasha|gozogalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozogalnkyaasha|gozogalnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zogagalasha|zogagalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zogagalshÃḋasha|zogagalshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zogagalroasha|zogagalroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zogagalmuasha|zogagalmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zogagalyaasha|zogagalyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozogagalnkshÃḋasha|gozogagalnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozogagalnkroasha|gozogagalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozogagalnkmuasha|gozogagalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozogagalnkyaasha|gozogagalnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zegÃḊlasha|zegÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zegÃḊlshÃḋasha|zegÃḊlshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zegÃḊlroasha|zegÃḊlroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zegÃḊlmuasha|zegÃḊlmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zegÃḊlyaasha|zegÃḊlyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozegÃḊlnkshÃḋasha|gozegÃḊlnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozegÃḊlnkroasha|gozegÃḊlnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozegÃḊlnkmuasha|gozegÃḊlnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozegÃḊlnkyaasha|gozegÃḊlnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zogfalasha|zogfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zogfalshÃḋasha|zogfalshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zogfalroasha|zogfalroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zogfalmuasha|zogfalmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zogfalyaasha|zogfalyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozogfalnkshÃḋasha|gozogfalnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozogfalnkroasha|gozogfalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozogfalnkmuasha|gozogfalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozogfalnkyaasha|gozogfalnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
